scripts.dev:apps: concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=@escort/api" "npm run dev --workspace=@escort/web"
scripts.db:migrate: npm run ensure:database && turbo run db:migrate
scripts.db:bootstrap: npm run db:migrate --workspace=@escort/db && npm run seed:models --workspace=@escort/api
scripts.pm2:hard-reload-api: pm2 delete escort-api && pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --only escort-api
scripts.vps:after-pull: npm ci && npm run build && npm run check:postgres-env && npm run ensure:database && npm run db:migrate && npm run pm2:reload-api && npm run pm2:reload-web
